Workspace Structure

This project root contains the following files and directories:

index.html
style.css
script.js
images/
ai/

The CSS file for the site is located at:

style.css

All styling modifications must be applied to that file.

The ai/ directory contains project context files that guide development.

Important rules:

- The workspace root is MYWEBSITE.
- style.css exists in the root directory.
- Always access files using relative paths from the root.
- Example: style.css
- Example: index.html

Never assume files are missing unless verified.

When performing design updates, edit style.css directly.
